sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95204" key="skotodasupukno/qric" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκοτο-δᾰσῠπυκνόθριξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τρῐχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dark with shaggy thick hair</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κυνῆ ς</foreign>. 'cap of darkness', ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg001.perseus-grc1:390" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">390</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
